programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pat & Gheorghe say ex-Marine son Rich battles drugs & alcohol despite rehabs & sober houses the past 16 years. It's been 3 years since the family has seen Rich--don't miss an emotional reunion. Plus, hear what Rich admits happened the night before taping.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jason & Shady have a blended family on the verge of falling apart. After knowing each other 2 months & meeting in person 1 time, they married. Each brought children into their new home & with seven kids under one roof, life isn't what anyone expected.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Anita, 73, married to the CEO of fast food restaurant chain Wendy's, is a felon, convicted of scamming friends & employees out of a half million dollars. Anita said she was duped by Ohio State, NFL quarterback, Art Schlichter. Victim or co-conspirator?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amanda, 25, says she was molested over 795 times by her father, Earl Nix, a secret when revealed to family was rejected despite Nix being convicted of first-degree criminal sexual conduct. The family comes face-to-face in an emotional attempt for truth.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed "fat guy" Eric was 560 lbs, so he decided to go on an epic bike ride across America. His goals were to lose weight, write a book & repair his relationship with his wife. His story went viral, as critics said Eric was scamming America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jodi Arias killed her ex-boyfriend Travis Alexander in 2008. He was stabbed more than 24 times, had his throat slit & was shot in the head. Behind-the-scenes trial details from prosecutor Juan Martinez & a juror & Travis's sister Tanisha speaks out.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom, Vicki, has been married to Marissa's dad, Robert, for 34 years. Marissa discovered her dad was having an "affair" and visiting "porn" and "call girl" websites. Robert, a former pastor, admits a relationship, but insists he's a victim.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Richard says his 6-yr marriage to Kelli ended due to her obsession with "stuff"! The couple, divorced now 12 yrs, is considering re-marriage but only if Kelli stops hoarding. You won't believe what producers saw & found when the home was tested for mold.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: April says a woman named Ashley is electronically "stealing" pictures of her twin daughters & posing as their mother online! April says Ashley has been obsessed with her daughters since their birth, won't stop & might even be driven to kidnap them! Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Gina asked Dr. Phil for help with her daughter Alexis, saying she was kidnapped by her survivalist boyfriend David. As the story unfolds, another layer surfaces, allegations of molestation by a family member. Find out who, and will a polygraph tell all?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she's not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace. Dr. Phil sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Julia & daugther Olivia, now 22, say Olivia's newborn daughter was taken illegally. Jyllian, who adopted Olivia's daughter, promised to provide pictures of the little girl & an opportunity to be part of her life. Jyllian says the adoption was legal. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues dialogue with Amanda who says she was sexually abused by her father, Earl Nix. Hear what Earl said to Amanda during a police-recorded phone call, which the jury heard. Amanda agrees to take a polygraph. Will the results convince? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with husband and wife, Nathan and April, who claim a woman named Ashley is fixated on their beautiful twin daughters and continuously posts pictures of them online, posing as their mother! How will Ashley react when confronted? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Former Subway spokesman Jared Fogle caught on tape. Listen to the shocking, never-before-heard audio recordings. Former journalist Rochelle Herman-Walrond secretly taped the pitchman for years as part of the FBI's investigation. Pt. 1

programme.desc: The Drysdales now jog so the banker can get the account of Jason Detweiler, head of a running club. The Clampetts don't understand the concept, leading to misunderstandings, then Ellie and Jethro become enthusiastic.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After Danny's brother-in-law, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), gets caught up with the mob and steals Danny's credit card, Danny forces Jimmy to take down the mobsters with Baez's help.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After a woman voices her outrage regarding the NYPD's inability to find her son's murderer, Danny reexamines the case, upsetting the original detective, Erin, and Anthony, who didn't pursue the case due to lack of evidence.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez race to find a missing girl who will die within 72 hours without her heart medication.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When Danny resorts to asking his incarcerated archenemy, Victor Lugo (Nick Cordero), for help locating a dangerous criminal who escaped from prison, Lugo refuses to assist unless he's allowed to accompany them on the pursuit.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank goes head-to-head with a data-tracking company when they refuse to unlock the phone of a terrorist that may hold information regarding upcoming targets.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When a series of drive-by murders occur after six wrongly convicted men are released from prison, Danny and Baez wonder if they were orchestrated by the men as an act of revenge in the eighth season finale.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny takes on a personal case involving a drug cartel member, Louis Delgado, who Danny believes is responsible for torching his house, and Erin is given a promotion in the DA's office but finds herself in a challenging situation.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Gormley looks to Danny and Baez for help tracking down a former NYPD detective he believes may be a threat to Frank's safety.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: While investigating a case involving a woman who shot her husband while she was drunk, Danny's instincts tell him there is more to the story.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez investigate a murder attempt against a celebrated fertility doctor with a seemingly pristine reputation. Also, Eddie is called to intervene in a Reagan family matter involving Danny's boys.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: While out hunting for a mountain lion, Joe accidentally shots Tessa Caldwell causing her to go blind. As a result of his guilt, Joe ends up proposing to the girl.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: In what is arguably the best comedy of the series, Hoss swears he has seen green elves running around the Ponderosa and a smooth-talking Irishman complicates matters even worse.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: In this sequel to "The Waiting Game", Laura resents Adam's advice on how she ought to be running her ranch. A newcomer, Ward Bannister, comes to her aid, but is actually part of a scheme to steal her ranch.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss is suffering from spring fever, goes to the wrong town and is accused of bank robbery.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Mateo Ibara and his wife Carla visit the Ponderosa. Ibara asks Will to return to Mexico with him. Ibara and Will fought together for Juarez's cause and Ibara saved Will's life.

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: While talking with an Indian, Ben is given an unexpected present... a woman. She is a young white woman named Joan who has lived with the Indians since she was a little girl.

programme.desc: Will is having second thoughts about staying on at the Ponderosa, and outlaws hit the ranch and take him with them.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben must travel to pay his respects after he learns of the death of his nephew Will. When he visits the grave, he finds his nephew barely alive with a bullet wound.

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: The Cartwrights are visited by their second cousin, Muley Jones of Weedville, Missouri who sings with a window-shattering voice and stirs up trouble with Indian negotiations that Ben is trying to ensure.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A headstrong Chinese girl (Marlo Thomas) visiting the Cartwrights incites labor unrest among local workers.

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations

programme.desc: Cuando Gibbs acepta ayudar a la amiga de la infancia de su hija, quien murió hace 15 años, se encuentra en el centro de un viaje emotivo e introspectivo a su pasado, llevando a una impactante y dolorosa conclusión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de oficiales participando en un claro caso de trampa, Frank se centra en encontrar al policía que filtró el video.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank pregunta si un encuentro con activistas comunitarios fue un accidente o una trampa. Jamie se esfuerza por depender menos de la información de Frank para tomar decisiones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que un ex oficial espera a Frank en un restaurante, se siente culpable por las circunstancias que rodearon el despido y trata de reintegrarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Un médium se acerca a Danny y Baez, afirmando saber qué le pasó a una mujer que fue encontrada muerta de un aparente suicidio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de un asesino en serie es ejecutado en Oklahoma, un imitador aparece y los agentes del FBI son llamados para encontrarlo. Al mismo tiempo, Prentiss se pone nerviosa pensando en una importante compra inmobiliaria.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC presenta uno de los casos más longevos de un asesino en serie a unos estudiantes universitarios, y llevan la clase a través de los 20 años en los que persiguieron al asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una banda de ladrones de bancos inicia su último robo en un banco de Washington D.C., la UAC intenta negociar los rehenes con los ladrones, pero las apuestas comienzan a elevarse cuando uno de los suyos se convierte en rehén.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras la UAC continua persiguiendo a los ladrones, el equipo determina que los sospechosos tienen un objetivo más grande en D.C., y con uno del equipo como rehén, tienen que trabajar rápidamente para desactivar una situación explosiva.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Cuando Gibbs acepta ayudar a la amiga de la infancia de su hija, quien murió hace 15 años, se encuentra en el centro de un viaje emotivo e introspectivo a su pasado, llevando a una impactante y dolorosa conclusión.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la muerte de un almirante de la Marina, la cual toma un giro inesperado y emotivo cuando se encuentran con una mujer buscando a su marido desaparecido, un refugiado político africano.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS cuida a un niño de nueve años cuyo padre es buscado por un caso de asesinato sin resolver.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS paga un alto precio cuando intentan localizar a un marino que cree que aún se encuentra en Irak.

programme.desc: The Sicilian way of life puts a premium on savoring family, life and food.

programme.desc: Tony travels to South Africa and discovers Johannesburg's culture and food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. During Mardi Gras officers arrest a man pickpocketing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man accused of burglary claims he’s hallucinating. A suspect tries to show off by parading his white pistol and causes pandemonium. A traffic stop offers an accused man a second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shoplifter flees on foot after stealing kids' shoes, an erratic driver has a concealed firearm (and something less concealed), and a man on probation gets his car searched.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers use a police SUV and a taser to stop a fleeing man with a knife. A hit-and-run suspect crashes into a gas station. An unlicensed driver has warrants in Greene County, Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends in a foot chase. Stolen property is found in a suspect’s car during a traffic stop. An altercation ends with a brick being tossed at a victim’s car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jumpy bicyclist mistakenly reveals more than he had planned, and officers search a darkened building in an attempt to thwart a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score drugs. Officers respond to a domestic violence call. Officers assist on a shots fired call, in which the suspect asserts that the weapon went off “accidentally”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The passenger of a fleeing driver makes his own getaway, a motorcyclist in a high-speed pursuit narrowly misses a car, and police respond to a disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver claims he was looking for companionship. A man admits to picking up a scantily clad lady and offering her $100 for her services. A man caught with meth claims he was set up by a girl.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Multiple units pursue a stolen vehicle on the run. A woman tells officers her intoxicated boyfriend destroyed her mailbox then fled. A loaded shotgun is found in a vehicle after a brief pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist tries to outsmart officers by hiding his bike in a retail garden area, and a concerned citizen reports seeing a man steal a package from a porch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police go off-roading to follow a stolen car, a man has odd excuses for having suspicious items, and an officer settles a dispute between a wife and her jealous husband.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver tries to escape through an occupied driveway, a man and his dad are found possessing more than just drugs, and five teenagers learn how weed can impact their future.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies search a suspicious vehicle behind a strip club. A man threatens to shoot employees at a car rental company. A man tosses lip balm filled with narcotics out the window during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues suspects for reckless driving, police respond to the armed robbery of a pizza delivery driver, and a deputy detects a unique scent during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is apprehended after trying to evade arrest, a convicted felon is detained when police make some illegal discoveries in his van, and deputies seize a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it. A talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details. A couple calls for help when they find an alligator in their yard.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: There police arrest a bicycling drug dealer and his female client. Police respond to a call of an unhinged Rottweiler. Officers arrest an inebriated man after they spot him grabbing a female bystander.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for backup after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chatty motorist becomes agitated when officers start asking questions, a fleeing driver calls his wife in the middle of a pursuit, and deputies catch a man in a lie.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a despised comic who died onstage, apparently after drinking from a tainted bottle of water.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The trampling death of a trainer by her horse aboard a private jet is investigated by Grissom, Catherine, and Nick. Sara and Warrick look into a Romeo and Juliet scenario in the desert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Nick investigate the murder of a woman in the press box of a high school stadium.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A professional bank robbery leads to the death of a detective. While investigating the case, Grissom deals with his hearing loss and another CSI gets a personal revelation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two couples meet in a bar and one of the couples is murdered. When a second couple is murdered in a similar fashion the team suspects a pair of serial killers are on the loose.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the lead suspects in Grissom's serial killer case are murdered, Grissom suspects an inside job.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick get the case of an elderly woman found mummified in her closet. Sara and Nick arrive to investigate a breaking and entering to find a raped teen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: During the latest heatwave in Las Vegas, with triple-digit temperatures, Gil and Catherine investigate a baby locked in a car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is introduced to the Furry side of Vegas when a man is found dead on the side of the road, dressed in a raccoon suit.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A severed head is shipped to Dr. Robbins from Jackpot, Nevada. Grissom goes to Jackpot to find the rest of the body and gets very little cooperation from the locals.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's appearance at the preliminary hearing on a rape and murder case goes terribly wrong when the only piece of evidence is thrown out on a technicality.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A suspect's infatuation with Catherine results in her taking over a high-profile case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The sheriff is under political pressure to find who killed an air marshal with a car bomb that the sheriff witnessed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A teenager is found murdered on a construction site. Grissom, Sara, and Warrick follow the lead of blood on a hammer.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de una anciana, Grissom recibe una réplica en miniatura de la escena del crimen; Greg asiste a una vista para determinar su culpabilidad en la muerte accidental de un adolescente.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando dos gemelas idénticas aparecen muertas, las pruebas en ambos casos no demuestran inmediatamente una conexión entre las dos muertes.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan una serie de asesinatos en Las Vegas que podrían estar relacionados con un infame jefe de la mafia de los años 70 que desapareció hace muchos años.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando los CSI procesan pistas tras un asesinato en una planta de fabricación de aves de corral, las pruebas les conducen a la casa de un hombre que colecciona trenes en miniatura y otra parafernalia en miniatura.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El testimonio de Catherine ante el tribunal no es suficiente para condenar a un asesino sospechoso de asesinar a su propia madre.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El principal sospechoso del sonado asesinato del asambleísta Danilo Zamesca es Thomas Simon, el mayor proveedor de drogas de la costa oeste.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando Catherine y Keppler comienzan a investigar el asesinato de una desconocida adolescente, ambos coinciden en que el asesino, que fue meticuloso a la hora de eliminar pruebas del cadáver y sus alrededores, es probablemente reincidente.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un caso relacionado con el cadáver calcinado de un hombre cuyos huesos y tejidos habían sido extraídos lleva a Nick y Keppler al inquietante mundo de la venta ilegal de partes de cuerpos humanos.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom regresa de su año sabático como profesor mientras el nuevo miembro del equipo Michael Keppler intenta desesperadamente mantener su oscuro pasado oculto a sus colegas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Con potencialmente menos de un día para intentar evitar los próximos asesinatos, el equipo de CSI debe sacudirse rápidamente la sorpresa de que el verdadero asesino en miniatura no es el difunto Ernie Edward Dell.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: La ocurrencia de Grissom de que dos jóvenes amantes desaparecidos pueden haber huido a México queda pronto anulada por el descubrimiento de gotas de sangre junto a la plaza de aparcamiento libre del chico en el instituto.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Mientras procesa la casa donde fueron asesinadas varias coristas, Sara se ve atormentada por los ojos aterrorizados y las crípticas palabras moribundas de la sexta víctima que descubre.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Greg se ve obligado a enfrentarse de nuevo a la hostil madre y al hermano del matón al que mató en defensa propia hace varios meses cuando el equipo de CSI descubre que el hermano está implicado en un nuevo caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Mientras Grissom y el resto de los CSI están fuera investigando nuevos casos, Hodges hace creer a Archie, Henry, Mandy y Wendy que Grissom quiere que se unan en secreto esa noche para intentar resolver los cuatro casos de asesinos en miniatura.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A rapist is brutally murdered after his identity is exposed. Horatio and the CSI team are called in to investigate the murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s Latin Festival shifts from Samba to somber when a crowded dance floor becomes the scene of a gang member. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s longtime criminal nemesis Walter Resden surfaces once again, and Caine is determined to finally bring him to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a white supremacist is acquitted for the murder of his wife after learning she is racially mixed, it’s up to Horatio to bring the killer down.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A band of masked gunmen invade an upscale spa, with the female customers' luxury cars as their booty. A customer is injured in the melee.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The bodies of two men, shot execution-style, are discovered in an abandoned hotel slated for demolition. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A cell phone call leads the team to investigate a kidnapping that, unless they reach the victim before it’s too late, could soon become a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young, ultra-glam heiress and media darling is found electrocuted in her bathtub during a party, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: Cartas a Julieta
programme.desc: Mientras está de vacaciones en Verona, Sophie se encuentra con una carta a Julieta y se embarca en una misión para encontrar a su autor.

programme.title: Cómo perder a un hombre en 10 días.
programme.desc: Una columnista acepta escribir, desde su propia experiencia, cómo lograr que un hombre se aleje de tu vida en solo 10 días.

programme.title: El curioso caso de Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Devotion: Una historia de héroes
programme.desc: Jonathan Majors (Creed III) y Glen Powell (Top Gun: Maverick) protagonizan esta épica e inspiradora historia real sobre dos pilotos de caza de élite estadounidenses durante la Guerra de Corea.

programme.title: El caso Thomas Crown
programme.desc: Thomas Crown (McQueen), un millonario de Boston, un hombre que se ha hecho a sí mismo, se aburre de la vida que lleva. Para huir de la rutina, prepara un golpe perfecto: robar un banco y marcharse después a Brasil.

programme.title: Negocios entrañables
programme.desc: Audrey Tautou (AMÉLIE) y Chiwetel Ejiofor (12 AÑOS DE ESCLAVITUD) protagonizan un thriller urbano crudo en el que dos inmigrantes descubren que todo está a la venta en los bajos fondos secretos de Londres.

programme.title: Thelma y Louise
programme.desc: En una de las mejores películas de carretera de todos los tiempos, Geena Davis y Susan Sarandon, en su paseo de la fama eterno, se convierten en dos mujeres que se embarcan en una serie de crímenes por todo el suroeste de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Ronin (ESP)
programme.desc: Un equipo de agentes especiales internacionales debe llevar a cabo una misión misteriosa: robar un maletín fuertemente custodiado buscado tanto por el IRA como por la mafia rusa.

programme.title: Doble traición
programme.desc: Una semana antes de Navidad, y después de pasar seis años en prisión, un expresidiario se ve obligado a participar en un atraco al casino.

programme.title: La suma de todos los miedos
programme.desc: La tensión entre Oriente y Occidente estalla cuando la CIA sospecha que científicos rusos disidentes están desarrollando más armas nucleares.

programme.title: La estafa maestra
programme.desc: Tras ser traicionados y abandonados a su suerte en Italia, Charlie Croker y su equipo planean un elaborado robo de oro contra su antiguo aliado.

programme.title: Contracara
programme.desc: Gracias a un nuevo procedimiento médico, un agente adquiere quirúrgicamente la misma apariencia que un criminal con el objetivo de desmantelar su organización terrorista.

programme.title: Cuenta final
programme.desc: Nick Wells, es un veterano ladrón, decidido reivindicarse, vivir con su novia y poner un club de jazz. Pero su amigo Max, le propone un último trabajo que lo hará pasar por imprevistos y traiciones.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: código sombra
programme.desc: El suspenso no se detiene mientras el recluta de la CIA Ryan queda atrapado en una peligrosa red de intriga y espionaje. Ryan debe pasar de soldado a analista a agente operativo para detener un complot terrorista devastador contra EE. UU.

programme.title: Contracara
programme.desc: Gracias a un nuevo procedimiento médico, un agente adquiere quirúrgicamente la misma apariencia que un criminal con el objetivo de desmantelar su organización terrorista.

programme.title: Bienvenidos al ayer
programme.desc: Cuando cinco adolescentes descubren una máquina que puede enviarlos al pasado, las posibilidades parecen ser infinitas. Pero al cambiar el pasado, amenazaron el futuro del mundo. ¿Podrán deshacer el daño causado antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: Bumblebee (ESP)
programme.desc: Bumblebee, un robot herido y destrozado, es encontrado y reparado por una adolescente llamada Charlie. Ambos deberán unir fuerzas para salvar el planeta de los malvados Decepticons en esta aventura llena de acción para toda la familia.

programme.title: El cuartel secreto
programme.desc: Charlie Kincaid descubre un cuartel general secreto debajo de su casa que parece pertenecer a un super héroe. Lo comparte con sus amigos, y ellos empiezan a creer que su padre separado podría tener una doble vida secreta.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el templo de la perdicion
programme.desc: En este éxito de taquilla, Indiana Jones debe rescatar a unos niños desaparecidos que han sido secuestrados por terroristas religiosos en Oriente y que, casualmente, están en posesión de unas joyas sagradas robadas.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y la ultima cruzada
programme.desc: No hay nada más emocionante que intentar seguir el ritmo de los Jones en «Indiana Jones y la última cruzada». Los enemigos nazis de Indy han vuelto y han secuestrado a su padre, en su intento por localizar el sagrado Santo Grial.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el reino de la calavera de cristal
programme.desc: En «Indiana Jones y el reino de la calavera de cristal», Indy (Harrison Ford) intenta adelantarse a una brillante y bella agente (Cate Blanchett) en la búsqueda de la mística y todopoderosa calavera de cristal de Akator.

programme.title: Un funeral de murte
programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policía?
programme.desc: Leslie Nielsen es Frank Drebin, el policía más "despistado" de las pelis, quien tendrá que detener un plan macabro para asesinar a la reina Isabel II durante una visita a Los Angeles.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policía? 2 1/2
programme.desc: Frank Drebin (Leslie Nielsen) adora el misterio. ¿Por qué estamos aquí? ¿Hay vida después del sexo? Sí, aborda los grandes temas, y el más grande es detener a Quentin Hapsburg (Robert Goulet) en su plan para destruir el medio ambiente.

programme.title: Marcelino
programme.desc: Marcelino es un niño abandonado criado en un monasterio. El niño tiene un amigo a quien le comparte todos los días pan y vino, un día, un grupo de soldados atacan por sorpresa al campamento, e intentan llevarse a Marcelino.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Cantinflas

programme.title: Open Your Eyes

programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: El crimen del padre Amaro
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.desc: Celeste puede haber encontrado el niñero perfecto para su sobrina y el amor navideño perfecto para ella misma.

programme.desc: Un reportero intentará sacar a la luz y resolver sobre un regalo perdido desde hace mucho tiempo que nunca se entregó en Navidad.

programme.desc: Mientras Phoebe busca una nueva tradición para animar sus vacaciones, se da cuenta de que no son las tradiciones las que apreciamos, sino las personas con quienes las compartimos.

programme.title: Una Navidad real sobre hielo
programme.desc: Un príncipe llega al norte del estado de Nueva York para establecer una empresa y se enamora de una ex patinadora olímpica.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: Una pareja decide ir a conocer los lugares donde se cometieron los crímenes de un libro de asesinos en serie, pero ni se imaginan que no tienen que ir muy lejos para conocer a unos brutales criminales.

programme.title: Exorcismo en el Vaticano
programme.desc: Ángela es poseída por una fuerza satánica ancestral y el padre Lozano debe salvar su alma y al mundo entero tal como lo conocemos.

programme.title: Guerra mundial Z
programme.desc: Guerra Mundial Z es una acelerada epopeya de lo que podrían ser los últimos días de la raza humana. El ex colaborador de la ONU Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) es llamado para ayudar a acabar con la caótica pandemia que se extiende por el mundo.

programme.title: Nunca Digas Su Nombre
programme.desc: Tres amigos se topan con los horribles orígenes de una misteriosa figura que descubren es la raíz del mal detrás de actos innombrables.

programme.title: Alias Jesse James
programme.desc: In this hilarious western spoof, insurance broker Milford Farnsworth (Bob Hope) unwittingly sells a life insurance policy worth $100,000 to the infamous Jesse James. Now, he has to figure out how to keep the deadliest outlaw in history alive!

programme.title: Pardners
programme.desc: A rich momma's boy returns west with the son of his murdered father's partner to foil a gang trying to gain control of his family ranch. They accidentally clean up the town.

programme.title: Larry McMurtry's Dead Man's Walk
programme.desc: As young Texas rangers, Gus McCrae and Woodrow Call join an ill-conceived effort to capture Santa Fe and annex New Mexico.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner, and Richard Attenborough headline a stellar cast in one of the most ingenious and suspenseful adventure films of all time as a team of Allied soldiers mount a daring escape from an inescapable Nazi POW camp.

programme.title: The Night Of The Hunter
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum stars in an unforgettable role as a psychopathic preacher in relentless pursuit of two children who have their dead father's stolen fortune hidden in a doll. Shelley Winters co-stars.

programme.title: Not As A Stranger
programme.desc: Shrewd and ambitious, Lucas Marsh will do anything to be a successful doctor. Even exploit and alienate those closest to him – including his long-suffering wife. But just as success appears within reach...one fatal error could destroy everything!

programme.title: Thunder Road (1958)
programme.desc: Lucas Doolin (Robert Mitchum) runs moonshine across the mountain back roads, dodging the law and the lawless alike. With government agents closing in on him, it seems the county may run dry--but Doolin slams the pedal to the metal for one last run.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: The Douglas' have their own small adventure when Steve is out of town on business. Tramp comes home with a live stick of dynamite and it is somewhere in the house.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation, things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it The Thing.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever…with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney is up to his money-making schemes again. When a government representative tells Mr. Haney that the state is looking to purchase the Douglas farm for a new highway, Mr. Haney arranges to buy back the farm from the Douglases at a steal.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Picking apples while on a picnic, Oliver runs into the feisty Ira Hatch, the owner of the apple orchard. However, once back in town, Mr. Drucker tells Oliver that Hatch has been dead for years. An incredulous Oliver agrees to see a psychologist.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After his elopement and cross-country honeymoon, Eb returns to Hooterville. But his new wife is nowhere to be found! After sending postcards from all across the country, Eb has to confess that his fiancé stood him up at the alter on their big day.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Someone has stolen $300 from Mr. Drucker's general store, and it looks like Eb is the culprit. How else could he have bought himself a new car that cost, you guessed it, exactly $300? But that is just the first twist of the many turns of this story.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa's dreams come true, and so do Oliver's nightmares, when Eb discovers a runaway boy sleeping in the hay in their barn. Lisa is only too excited about the idea of having the sounds of platters of little feet around the house.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude feels the romance has gone out of her marriage; her problem now is convince Walter to do something about it. Maude's sure a weekend with Walter at a mountain cabin would be the perfect setting to rekindle their fire.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's mother pays a rare visit, transforming Maude into a quivering mass of guilt and insecurity. Wanting her mother to approve of Walter, whom she has never met, Maude over-reacts, putting the entire household into a state of hysteria.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude breaks the news that she's been asked to run for the State Senate, everyone is happy and proud, but Walter, who fears her political life would ruin their marriage.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude decides to run for the State Senate, Walter decides to run to the nearest swinging-singles bachelor pad -- it looks like Maude may have struck out for the fourth time in the marital sweepstakes.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Walter's separation is on a collision course as each shows up at the Harmons' anniversary party with a 'date.' Broadway musical-comedy star Bernadette Peters guest stars as Kathy Rivers, Walter's date for the party.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude decides her marriage is over -- Walter has fallen off the wagon and was seen by her in a compromising situation. Then Walter comes home with hopes of patching things up only to find Maude herself in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: It's Maude's moment of truth. After a long campaign for the State Senate and an equally tough campaign to save her marriage, it's election day in Tuckahoe.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: How do you say to your best friend, 'Welcome home -- your dog is dead!'? That's the problem facing a hysterical Maude when Vivian' s dog, Chuck, dies while in Maude's care.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Mrs. Naugatuck's behavior is stranger than ever, but this time her tall tales are costing everyone money. When Maude finds out Mrs. Naugatuck has taken everyone for a ride, she's determined to get to the bottom of the con.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: A chance meeting with her ex-husband sparks an old flame in Vivian...and Maude adds fuel to the fire by unwittingly encouraging Viv to see Chuck along.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The day has come that Mike and Gloria are moving into their new home and Archie is practically pushing them out the door. Archie is being so obnoxious that Mike finally reaches a boiling point until he declares his independence and calls Archie a fathead.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie will do anything to get a promotion at the loading dock. So, he agrees to help Mr. Sanders with his latest charity, unaware that it involves something that goes against his morals - organ donation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While driving Munson's cab, Archie saves the life of a beautiful woman who becomes unconscious. Uh, was that a woman? Sorry, that was no woman, thanks to female impersonator Beverly LaSalle's convincing act.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike - along with everyone else - debate where he should be when Gloria is in the delivery room giving birth to their baby.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie rips up a chain letter, thinking it to be nothing more than baloney. Then a whole bunch of accidents happen. Coincidence or did Archie really set off the string of mishaps?

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Gloria gets her paycheck in the mail, it is good news and bad news. The good news is that the check is more than she expected. The bad news is that the check also comes enclosed with a pink slip.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Carolyn, the unfaithful wife of a city prosecutor, witnesses a murder after meeting her paramour in a hotel. She cannot identify him, but the killer, an escapee from a mental institution, befriends and begins stalking her.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Victor Buono guest stars as Eric Damien, an international thief, who enlists a carnival sleight-of-hand artist to steal a nickel valued by coin experts at $100,000.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A daring bank robbery carried out under the cover of a mock military emergency sends McGarrett and his Five-O detectives to the windward side of Oahu.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The Banzai Pipeline, one of the world's most exciting and dangerous surfing beaches, forms the backdrop for a trio of slayings. McGarrett is thwarted when the man is found murdered near the Pipeline.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A bunco game using phony diamonds as bait and preying on well-heeled male Waikiki tourists sends McGarrett and Five-O into action in an attempt to head off a sinister racket.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A young man, Ted Reynolds, is an eyewitness to a murder, then becomes the next target of the assassin. In his flight from the assassin, Reynolds loses his library card, and the card is quickly put to use by the killer, who starts a hunt for Reynolds.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Jack Lord makes his directing debut with this episode about a retired Federal narcotics agent whose son becomes embroiled in a heroin refining operation. McGarrett becomes suspicious of the activities of young Tom Morgan.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Sparta police look into the murder of a wealthy invalid whose philandering husband is having an affair with a local beautician. All the evidence points to the beautician as the prime suspect, but she soon finds her own life is in danger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Jenny Sawyer, a victim of domestic abuse, is fearful of her husband, Wesley, but she constantly covers up for him and refuses help. When Wesley is murdered outside a local tavern, the police wonder if Jenny may have taken matters into her own hands.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Odessa Robbins is a civil rights hero in Sparta, and the town is planning a celebration of her life. Gillespie’s worries about old racial tensions resurfacing are sadly justified when the festivities are disrupted, putting Odessa’s life in danger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A series of suspicious truck accidents on an old country road lead the Sparta police to a local drug ring. Gillespie and his team must find the dealer and put an end to the operation. Meanwhile, Virgil and Althea are at odds about taking a vacation.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Rebecca Ballard and her husband Peter own a fancy restaurant in Sparta; however, Rebecca is having a love affair with Brian Moss, who owns a local auto repair shop. They plan to kill Peter for a large life insurance policy, but their plan goes awry.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Harriet DeLong has cared for her nephew Eric ever since her sister Natalie’s murder. Suddenly, Harriet must fight for custody of the boy, as his dead father's widow, Emily Trundel, has come to town with the money and resources to take Eric away.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Warren Moseley, a highly respected man in Sparta, has two grown sons who are always at odds: Louis is dedicated to the family business, while Brian has wasted his years away gambling and partying. Will Brian's gambling debts destroy the family?

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: While on a drive, Walker and Alex find a child walking alone on the back road. She says her father was taken by men from space. The rangers and Alex investigate the strange lights and sounds despite being warned off by the Air Force.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A geologist is killed after he claims to have found the lost treasure of Hayes Cooper, a Wild West Texas Ranger. Walker tells Trivette the story of the treasure as they investigate. Walker gets bit by a rattlesnake and has dreams of Cooper.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A geologist is killed after he claims to have found the lost treasure of Hayes Cooper, a Wild West Texas Ranger. Walker tells Trivette the story of the treasure as they investigate. Walker gets bit by a rattlesnake and has dreams of Cooper.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver unwittingly invades an encampment in the Burmese jungle.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver flees from the Budapest police and the KGB while attempting to free a band of gypsy pickpockets imprisoned for stealing a watch containing top-secret information.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver fights for his life in one of his most awesome adventures as he travels to the sweltering jungles of South America

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a photoshop erroneously sends Dr. Sloan the wrong set of photographs, he becomes embroiled in the murder investigation of an escort girl. Meanwhile, Amanda's baby is about to come to term.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: In an episode reminiscent of Hitchcock's Strangers on a Train, Dr. Sloan is drawn into a murder pact by a psychiatrist in need of money. The psychiatrist kills a woman pestering Dr. Sloan, expecting Mark to eliminate his problem.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse is attracted to a beautiful psychic, who also happens to be the prime suspect in a murder. Amanda copes with the trials of motherhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The daughter of one of Mark's friends writes a juicy tell-all expose of the most prominent public figures. Mark takes her in after a crazed stalker starts threatening her and her co-authors.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates a perky morning television personality for the murder of a Howard Stern-like radio host.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan is the executor of his friend, Preston Michael's, estate after Michaels is found in the body of a shark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A friendly-fire incident involving a veteran cop leaves Steve's friend dead, but the shooting only appears to be unintentional.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse and Dr. Sloan have contact with a contagious victim of a genetically altered smallpox strain.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg loses a bet to Bobby and has to be his slave for a week.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter writes a newspaper column to win points with his teacher.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Alice’s tough-as-nails cousin fills in while she is out of town.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Carol’s minor parking lot accident turns into a court case.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: After bad luck continues to befall the family, the Brady boys set out to learn about the ancient tiki. They learn the tiki is tabu and must be discarded at an ancient burial ground.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Brady boys arrive at the cave to return the idol to the burial site, only to be held prisoners by an angry archaeologist who lays claim to the cave and believes that they stole the idol.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia is apprehensive about her first day of high school, so Mike asks Greg to help break the ice for her. Meanwhile, Peter tries to make a working volcano for the Science Club.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter has a crush on Jan's new friend but every plan to impress her backfires. Inspired by "Cyrano de Bergerac", he launches a final plan to win her over with Greg's help but it also backfires when she falls for Greg instead.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The boys try to spook the girls in the middle of the night with a ghost, so they try to get revenge by giving them a taste of their own medicine. But after Alice criticizes them for being so scared, the kids collectively have a new target.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan feels disrespected and ignored by her brothers and sisters, so she tells everyone that she wishes she was an only child. Meanwhile, Carol and Alice have a competition over who can cook the best strawberry preserves.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike thinks Greg wants to be an architect after reading Greg's school essay, but Greg doesn't want to hurt Mike's feelings and tell him the truth. Meanwhile, the other Brady kids also begin thinking about their future careers.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The kids give Alice the cold shoulder after they think she has broken their trust, so Alice decides to leave her job as housekeeper. However, the kids soon regret the decision after the new housekeeper teaches them a lesson.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama sits in on Vint's poker game when one of his friends has to cancel. After an evening of childhood stories, Vint ends the evening broke and belittled in front of his pals.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama and longtime friend Ramon enter a dance competition that Vint and Naomi are contestants in, and nothing is going to stop Mama from winning.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama suspects Bubba and his new study partner are doing more than studying. But, while hiding in Bubba's closet, Mama instead discovers Vint and Naomi's attempts to get pregnant.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When a new town dump is planned for her street, Mama refuses to sell the house. A connection to the town's founder is uncovered, and the mayor reluctantly changes plans.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama reluctantly gets a phone machine, and Vint and Naomi hide a stray dog in the garage—and convince Mama that she's getting senile when she claims she keeps hearing a dog barking.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Iola buys a lottery ticket with Mama's change at the store, Mama doesn't care enough to keep the ticket—until Iola wins a chance to spin the lottery wheel for $2 million.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: After going to a cousin's funeral, Mama plans a suitable funeral for herself. However, it will require their savings for vacation and for her to bow out of the bowling competition.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama claims to have a date for Valentine's Day, Iola resorts to "Rent A Gent," but she gets a much younger and much better looking escort than she expected.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: While Mama disputes a bill, the electric company turns the power off—the night that Bubba has to finish a paper on Abraham Lincoln and Iola is up for an award at the Food Circus.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama finally gets the house to herself when everyone goes away for the weekend. But the peace and quiet is far from the paradise she expects.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Peggy's amnesia allows Al to mold her into the perfect wife.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al's boss falls in love with Bud.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: When he starts charging Bud rent, Al is confined to the basement until he makes some much-needed repairs.

programme.title: Married... With Children

programme.title: Married... With Children

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Bill Kurtis examines one of the most infamous cold cases in Los Angeles history.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Looks at how law enforcers stick with cases for many years, using fresh evidence to win convictions or to free prisoners who were wrongfully jailed. We examine the unsolved murder of Hogan's Heroes star Bob Crane.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In June 1985, a 20-year-old "Sucker Day" Festival Queen is found brutalized. The small community of Nixa, Missouri, is certain her blood is on the hands of a local wealthy businessman, but after 25 years DNA reveals the true killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In 1983, Navy seamen Sonny Grotton left base for a long weekend at home. But as he pulled into his driveway, a gunman killed him. And in 1993, former state trooper Doug Wright claimed his estranged wife shot and killed herself in their home.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When Sherry Leighty goes missing in 1999, her family is left wondering how a dedicated mother of three could vanish without a trace. A decade later, the cold case heats up when Sherry's sister launches a social media campaign.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: 13 days after Pam Pitts disappears in 1988 her charred body is found at a popular hangout spot in the Arizona desert. When a second victim is discovered in a mineshaft, detectives suspect the killer may have known them both.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: After the murder of her aunt goes cold, a woman helps launch an advocate group that brings awareness to cases that have gone unsolved.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A high school janitor is suspected in the murder of a young girl, but with only circumstantial evidence to go on, police must let the case go cold. And a woman asks the police to reopen the 24-year-old case of her cousin's disappearance.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: From England to Texas to Georgia, I.R. will go inside cold case units and watch as police use ballistics testing, old fashioned fingerprints and a new DNA data bank for criminals, to crack open the mysteries of unsolved crimes.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Investigators in Virginia, probing the murder case of a sailor, seek the help of a forensic anthropologist from the "body farm" in the Great Smoky Mountains. Dr. William Bass became an expert on the human body's rate of decay by watching bodies.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A district attorney uses a clever technique--a "John Doe indictment"--to give law enforcement officials the time they need to track down the Schoolgirl Rapist from Rochester, N. Y.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In Cree culture, a promise is sacred. When Cree woman Shirley Soosay goes missing in 1980, her niece Violet promises her grandmother that she will bring Shirley home.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In Portland, Maine a housewife disappears. One year later her body is unearthed in the cellar. I.R. unravels this cold case investigation from the inside out. With the help of science, police are able to uncover a blueprint of the crime.

programme.title: Con el culo al aire

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Man Sleeping With My Teen Nephew?
programme.desc: Paul confesses 3 secrets to his girlfriend Alycia.Is Brandi's husband is still having sex with Ashley after their threesome? Plus, Tim’s fidelity status could ruin his chances of marrying Laurie!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With My Daughter's Girlfriend
programme.desc: These women are desperate to hear MAURY say the words “YOU ARE THE FATHER!” But these men want to hear him say “YOU ARE NOT THE FATHER!” But only MAURY’s got the results they’re looking for!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'll Prove You Are Cheating on My Teen!
programme.desc: Instead of chocolates and dinners, these guests are being cheated on and dumped. Love may be blind, but lie detector tests and hidden cameras will reveal the truth!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'll Prove You Are Cheating on My Teen!
programme.desc: Chris cheated and impregnated Lakin's neighbor. He denies he fathered Lakin’s baby. Then, John’s back for a 3rd DNA test. Can Jade prove that he’s the father or is her record 0-3?

programme.title: The Maury Show: My Wife Had a Threesome. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Keith is terrified that Chyna cheated and their daughter may not be his. Could Keith’s best friend be the real father? Will the DNA results quash Omar's denials about fathering Jennifer’s child?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Man Sleeping With My Teen Nephew?
programme.desc: Nikki won’t marry Will until he proves he’s faithful, but what did our hidden cameras confirm? Then, teens Jessica and Sean are days away from marriage. Could Sean be cheating with her best friend?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Men Tested … Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Tony cheated on his wife Tiff and impregnated another woman. Now he’s denying both of their kids! Plus, more shocking tales of mad moms, denying dads and DNA drama!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Top Ten Shocking Family Feuds
programme.desc: We’re counting down the top ten most unbelievable moments of family faceoffs! Plus we’ll let you know what happened to some of these guests after they left our show and returned to their lives.

programme.title: The Maury Show: 4 Women … 4 Babies … Is He the Father?
programme.desc: We have more of the paternity pandemonium that you crave! You’ll see denying dads, mad moms and some of the most shocking results we’ve ever seen! Don’t miss one second of the drama on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Toni, Quintin, and his mom return to find out who fathered his son. This time they’ll wonder if Toni cheated! Jenny needs to know whether her husband Matt or his friend fathered her child! Finally, will Vivian end her 30-year search for her son?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: 22-year-old Vernetta says 55-year-old Ronnie is her son's father and lied about his age when they hooked up! Next, is Krystal sleeping with her own relatives? Could their kids not be his? Plus, Keke returns to tell Tyrone a secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Charisma suspects her boyfriend Trey is sleeping with another woman…her cousin Kisha! Next, Jamie and Byron return with fresh cheating accusations about Byron! Will this on-and-off-again couple truly split when the results come out?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Deshan's sister and mother believe he's lying about Joshua Jr.'s paternity and want a paternity test to have the last word! Then, 24-year-old Melissa had a baby with 47-year-old Rob, but Rob's daughter wants DNA proof! Find out today on MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Saundra is 58 and dating 28 –year-old Ernesto. She suspects he's cheating with her 38-year-old daughter! Then, a wedding is in danger when Shante caught her fiancé texting her niece! Did Kandi catch her fiancé Jason watching his own video?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Regina says Fernando fathered her son! Fernando's mother disagrees. His father and aunt believe Regina. Fernando can't sound off because he was killed. Krystal and Ben can't agree on their relationship status and who fathered Krystal's daughter!

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a successful young doctor collapses, a blood test reveals cyanide poisoning, resulting in a criminal investigation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When police investigate the shooting death of a man who was in bed with his wife, they discover a complex case with two suspects.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A love triangle leads to years of stalking, property destruction, threats, and murder.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Kathleen Schroll makes a phone call right before her death where she identifies her killer, which leads to an arrest. Two trials and 12 years later, authorities begin to wonder who was really the victim.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When an Iowa woman is attacked while home alone with her three children, the confrontation turns deadly.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of a college student leads authorities to her theater group and a new crime that exposes the truth.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to run background checks on the remaining 5 guys, so she invites their ex-girlfriends to spend a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their exes give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better, so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Final Adios
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final 2 men to pack their bags because they're goin' to Playa Car, Mexico for an exotic getaway!

programme.title: I Love New York: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: New York must eliminate 5 men, but it's not that easy. At a pre-elimination cocktail party, things heat up as the men drink too much, fight and even bribe others to win over New York.

programme.title: I Love New York: Flowers from Fishburne
programme.desc: Now down to 15 men, New York invites the guys to a pond where they must prove their love by swimming to her and presenting her with a gift.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Stolen Date
programme.desc: With 12 guys left, some of the boys play a prank on a few of the less popular men that keeps them up all night.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nobody Likes a Snitch
programme.desc: New York has barely wiped the morning out of her eyes when a fight breaks out between two of her boys. Although NY can be a tolerant person, violence is non-negotiable and she is faced with the tough decision to let a guy go.

programme.title: I Love New York: Blood Oath Gone Bad
programme.desc: After snitching, fighting, and spitting, and nearly getting eliminated, one man is the house enemy and anxiously waits for an opportunity to redeem himself.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nip/Suck
programme.desc: New York surprises the guys with the return of one man. Another man is unhappy as his world is suddenly turned upside down and he literally fears for his life.

programme.title: I Love New York: I Still Have Love for New York
programme.desc: New York invites the remaining six guys' exes to the house and this time, there's a special twist involved. She's bringing two of HER exes, Chance and Real, to help dig up some dirt on her guys.

programme.title: I Love New York: Mind Games
programme.desc: With 5 guys left, New York wants to find out who's the most compatible with her and who's just plain crazy, when she takes the boys for a psych test.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Loveable high school choir director Bryce Gage has big dreams for his small town of Marble Falls, TX.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fiona takes drastic measures to feel safer at home, and puts herself in danger. Dallas avoids telling Alli the truth about his past. After blowing off a French assignment, Zig tries to impress the teacher,

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya lets loose at a party and posts a video online, hoping it'll change her image. The battle for the student council presidency heats up when Drew enters the race. Connor tries to play matchmaker for his friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Despite her illness, Clare is determined to remain a regular girl. Alli is lonely in Paris and tries to make the best of it without her BF and Tristan tries to 'bro' up while rooming with the guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare receives crushing news while waiting for her MRI results. Needing time away from the hospital, Clare convinces Drew to help her escape.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Why is Becky blowing Adam off to spend time with Todd? Who's Todd? Adam is not liking this long-distance relationship thing. Alli is falling hard for her Parisian waiter and worries maybe too hard too fast?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Leo and Alli are getting to feel really serious. Distraught Drew needs to visit camp for comfort. Maya must show up Zoë and puts an expensive dress on her mother's credit card… nothing could possibly go wrong, right? !

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As summer comes to an end, Becky tries to understand the meaning behind an unexpected tragedy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Adam, the Degrassi students try their best to move on but when it's your brother… And fitting in is hard for Zoë because she's never just been a normal girl. Alli reunites with Leo on her home turf.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew does his best as Degrassi President but without sleep, he's not much good. By Drew's side, Zoë becomes the first lady of Degrassi. Leo does damage control and tries to get in with Alli's friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The opportunity to write for a real-life magazine is offered to Clare but her brain after cancer is not cooperating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to concoct any excuse to save her reputation with the magazine but doesn’t want to play the cancer card.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Focusing more on her music than Miles, Maya lets Zoë talk her into making a sexy music video.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miles helps Maya discover who is behind her video going viral. Maya's hellbent on revenge, getting her into hot water.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Student council prez Drew is psyched about his Degrassi TV interview but when the story sheds a negative light, Drew’s stunned.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is excited to have Bianca back in town for Thanksgiving but is surprised when she isn't as forthcoming as he expected.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Alli’s birthday, but all she can think about is Leo being sent back to France.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli is still lying to protect Leo, but her stories are beginning to unravel. Maya shows her rubber room classmates that she isn’t a princess.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew attempts juggling his new job and his new girl. To forget about Leo, Alli focusses on her science experiment. After getting thrown out of class for forgetting to wear a bra, Imogen plans a scathing piece for Degrassi TV.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Failing at balancing his life, Drew decides he has to break up with Zoë. Alli partners up with Dallas in an attempt to stay focused on her science experiment. Imogen takes her dress code fight online, but what does she really want to achieve?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A shocking discovery leads Miles to question his family life. Eli is slipping away, and Clare finds herself growing closer to Drew. Dallas wants to be with Alli, but the truth about her relationship with Leo could send him over the edge.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miles is determined to out his father’s secrets, but he may not be ready for the whole truth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With rumours swirling about Zoë’s drunken adventures at a recent party, Becky files a DTV report about teen girls and alcohol.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky wants to put things right after making a false accusation about Zoë's assault. But once she discovers the truth and sees how deeply this is affecting everyone, Becky questions if she's doing the right thing.
